widgets_values: Prompt: An extreme close-up macro shot of a Southeast Asian woman's face, early morning light hitting her skin. The image must show ultra-realistic skin texture: visible pores, faint freckles across the nose,  She has no makeup, emphasizing natural beauty. The background is a soft, out-of-focus window with morning mist. The lighting is soft and diffused, highlighting the subsurface scattering of the skin (the glow beneath the surface). No smoothing, no plastic look, pure photorealism.
